scriptLines: query: 'Select * from [SIM_103].SIM_VW_BOB_OOS_PUBLISH where Policy_Status in (\'Rapid Disenrollment\', \'Fall out Continuous Coverage\')',

query: 'SELECT User_Id, 
       First_Name, 
       Last_Name, 
       Email_Address, 
       Termination_Flag, 
       Department_Name, 
       NPN_Grouping, 
       Upline_Id,
       Upline_First_Name, 
       Upline_Last_Name, 
       Level_Seq, 
       MAX(Record_Load_date) AS Max_Record_Load_date
FROM [AIA_102].[AIA_AGENCY_EMP_HIER_DETAILS_HISTORY] AS emp
WHERE NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM [AIA_102].[AIA_AGENCY_PAYEE_DETAILS] AS payee
    WHERE payee.Employee_ID = emp.USER_ID
)
GROUP BY User_Id, 
         First_Name, 
         Last_Name, 
         Email_Address, 
         Termination_Flag, 
         Department_Name, 
         NPN_Grouping, 
         Upline_Id,
         Upline_First_Name, 
         Upline_Last_Name, 
         Level_Seq',

query: 'Select 

CONTRACT_YEAR,EMPLOYEE_TYPE,EMPLOYEE_ID,FULL_NAME,PRIMARY_ROLE,MONTHLY_RENEWAL_WRITING_AGENT_COMP_TIER,

PRE_ACA_WRITING_AGENT_COMP_TIER,LTL_WRITING_AGENT_COMP_TIER,MED_SUP_WRITING_AGENT_COMP_TIER,

DENTAL_NEWSALE_WRITING_AGENT_COMP_TIER,ACA_NEWSALE_WRITING_AGENT_COMP_TIER,GROUP_WRITING_AGENT_COMP_TIER,

ANCILLARY_RENEWAL_WRITING_AGENT_COMP_TIER,PAYROLL_ID,PAYEE_EMPLOYEE_ID,PAYEE_NAME,MAIN_UPLINE_EMPLOYEE_ID,

MAIN_UPLINE_FULL_NAME,ROLE_END_DATE,ROLE_END_REASON,ALL_SALES_PAYEE,SUBMITTING_AGENT,SECONDARY_ROLE,

DEPARTMENT_ENTITY_ID,DEPARTMENT_NAME,[HEALTH_ACA_EMPLOYEE TIER],ADVANCE_OVERRIDE_PAYEE_ID

from [AIA_102].AIA_AGENCY_PAYEE_DETAILS Where

RECORD_LOAD_DATE in (Select max(RECORD_LOAD_DATE) from [AIA_102].AIA_AGENCY_PAYEE_DETAILS)

union

Select CONTRACT_YEAR,EMPLOYEE_TYPE,EMPLOYEE_ID,FULL_NAME,PRIMARY_ROLE,MONTHLY_RENEWAL_WRITING_AGENT_COMP_TIER,

PRE_ACA_WRITING_AGENT_COMP_TIER,LTL_WRITING_AGENT_COMP_TIER,MED_SUP_WRITING_AGENT_COMP_TIER,

DENTAL_NEWSALE_WRITING_AGENT_COMP_TIER,ACA_NEWSALE_WRITING_AGENT_COMP_TIER,GROUP_WRITING_AGENT_COMP_TIER,

ANCILLARY_RENEWAL_WRITING_AGENT_COMP_TIER,PAYROLL_ID,PAYEE_EMPLOYEE_ID,PAYEE_NAME,MAIN_UPLINE_EMPLOYEE_ID,

MAIN_UPLINE_FULL_NAME,ROLE_END_DATE,ROLE_END_REASON,ALL_SALES_PAYEE,SUBMITTING_AGENT,SECONDARY_ROLE,

DEPARTMENT_ENTITY_ID,DEPARTMENT_NAME,[HEALTH_ACA_EMPLOYEE TIER],ADVANCE_OVERRIDE_PAYEE_ID

from [AIA_102].AIA_AGENCY_PAYEE_DETAILS_AUTOMATION_TO_LOAD',
query: 'Select * from [SIM_103].SIM_VW_BOB_OOS_PUBLISH where Policy_Status not in (\'Inactive\', \'Rapid Disenrollment\', \'Fall out Continuous Coverage\')',

STEP_8
AIA FB BOB REFRESH STEP 2 STEP 1 IS CHECK PREVIOUS WEEK DATA USING BELOW QUERY, data should be previous week

Where period_end_date = (Select max(period_end_date) from [AIA_102].AIA_BOOK_OF_BUSSINESS_ALL_CARRIERS_FB_HISTORY);

activities.name: AIA_OOS_BOB
activities.description:
WEEKLY GENERATE AIA NATIONAL BOB


Select E2EIS_SEQ_NUMBER,	CARRIER,	OWNING_AGENT_OF_RECORD,	ASSIGNED_AGENT_NUMBER,	BROKER_START_DATE,	
  BROKER_END_DATE	,PRODUCT_TYPE,	PRODUCT_DESCRIPTION	,IMS_TRANSACTION_ID,	POLICY_STATUS,	POLICY_ID,	
  GROUP_NAME,	MEMBER_COUNT	,[ON/OFF_EXCHANGE],	EXCHANGE_SUBSCRIBER_ID,	COVERAGE_TYPE,	
  SUBSCRIBER_ORIGINAL_EFFECTIVE_DATE,	COVERAGE_START_DATE	,COVERAGE_END_DATE,	PAID_THROUGH_DATE,
  SUBSCRIBER_FIRST_NAME,	SUBSCRIBER_MIDDLE_NAME,	SUBSCRIBER_LAST_NAME,	SUBSCRIBER_FULL_NAME,	
  SUBSCRIBER_DOB,	SUBSCRIBER_EMAIL,	ADDRESS,	ADDRESS_2,	ZIP_CODE,	CITY,	STATE,	COUNTY,
  APP_SUBMIT_DATE,	MEMBER_PHONE_NUMBER_1,	MEMBER_PHONE_NUMBER_2,	COMPENSATION_TYPE,	COMPENSATION_PERIOD,
  COMPENSATION_AMOUNT,	PAYEE_NAME,	MAIN_UPLINE_AGENT,	GROUP_TEAM_SALES,	TRANSITION_DATE,	
  ASSIGNED_AGENT_NAME,	AGENCY_ID,	RECORD_LOAD_DATE,	RECORD_LOADED_BY,	RECORD_DATA_SOURCE,
  RECORD_FLAG_STATUS,	COMMENTS,	POLICY_ADDED_DATE,	POLICY_REMOVED_DATE,	POLICY_CANCELLED_DATE,	
  POLICY_REACTIVATION_DATE,	POLICY_RETENTION_DATE,	ADDS_MEMBER_COUNT,	CANCELS_MEMBER_COUNT,
  ORIGINAL_POLICY_STATUS,	ACTIVITY_FLAG,	Period_Start_date,	Period_End_date,	Period_Name,	
  Period_Description,	Bill_Status	,AGENCY_SUBSCRIBER_ORIG_EFFDATE,	AGENCY_SUBSCRIBER_ORIG_EFFDATE_HIS
from [AIA_102].[AIA_BOOK_OF_BUSSINESS_ALL_CARRIERS_JOINED]
     ORDER BY 
    Carrier ASC,
    Policy_ID ASC,
    Policy_Status ASC,
    Coverage_Start_Date DESC;
